# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

- name: Cache Node Modules
  uses: actions/cache@v2
    with:
      path: |
        ./node_modules
        .yarn
        .pnpm-store
        .pnp
        .pnpmfile.cjs
        .pnpmfile.js
        .config/configstore/
        .config/globalstore/
        .local/*
        .vscode/*
        .eslintcache
        .npmrc
        package-lock.json
- name: Cache Pip Packages
  uses: actions/cache@v2
    with:
      path: |
        ./pip3_modules/.cache*
        /usr/lib/python*/pip3_modules
        ./pip3_modules/site-packages
- name: Cache Yarn Modules
  uses: actions/cache@v2
    with:
      path: |
        yarn.lock
- name: Cache Poetry Packages
  uses: actions/cache@v2
    with:
      path: poetry.lock
